textPlain: Cool! I like the website theme picker

Thank you - I don't think I explicitly state this anywhere on the website - but all the different themes were made by Claude Code with Dreamtap providing different sources of inspiration - I wasn't involved in designing them at all.Notably, GPT-5-Codex is significantly worse at this, it has a much stronger drive to make one specific style of website.
the first theme i got was some comic sans neon hellscape and until i realized i could re-roll, i had serious doubts about this project lol
